title: Legends Badgers
description: a mod that adds the badgers from mc legends to minecraft
body:
Legends Baders is a Neoforge, Forge mod that adds the badgers from mc legends to the base game, the badgers spawn within forest biomes and will randomly dig for items, when they start digging they will have a chance to drop a item from a custom loot table!


Issues & Suggestions: [Join Belgie's Discord](https://discord.gg/C9jkQda)


New Features in 1.21.4 & 1.21.5: We have made a lot of changes in the new versions including a model / texture update to match the minecraft feel a lot more, we have also added a custom loot table that the badgers dig up and finally we have added data-driven badger variants so you can now add custom variants with datapacks and resourcepacks (Coming Soon)

New Update Showcase (Coming Soon)
